title: Admin Ops Configuration
description: Configuration for the Admin Operations API that allows SaaS Hypervisor to trigger administrative operations.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the Admin Ops API is enabled.

mtls.title: mTLS Configuration
mtls.description: Mutual TLS authentication configuration for the Admin Ops API.

requireClientCert.description: Require client certificate when mTLS is enabled.

allowedCNs.description: Comma-separated list of allowed certificate Common Names.

allowedSANs.description: Comma-separated list of allowed Subject Alternative Names.

allowedIssuers.description: Comma-separated list of allowed certificate issuer DNs.
